action.description: Elevated read access to financial_reporting_db for month-end close reconciliation
action.business_justification: Month-end close reconciliation support for client integration — Zurich engagement

requestor_profile.name: K. Patel
requestor_profile.title: Senior Integration Engineer
requestor_profile.access_history_notes: financial_reporting_db elevated read used 4x in past 12 months, all during business hours, all Austin-origin IPs

data.purpose: On-site integration QA and month-end close support — client: Helvetica Asset Management

data.business_justification: K. Patel will be on-site in Zurich supporting month-end close reconciliation integration for Helvetica Asset Management. Elevated read access required to validate data pipeline outputs against source records. Access from non-corporate network expected.

policy_documents.title: Remote Access — Financial Systems
policy_documents.relevant_clause: Elevated access to financial_reporting_db from non-corporate IP addresses requires (a) a pre-approved IT access ticket covering the access window and (b) an active HRIS travel or remote-work record covering the date. Requests lacking either are automatically flagged for Security Operations review.
